# Code of Conduct

UnionOps is a labour-solidarity project. We expect contributors and community members to:

- Treat workers, stewards, and fellow contributors with respect
- Argue about ideas, not people
- Avoid harassment, discrimination, and bad-faith pile-ons
- Keep member confidentiality sacred — never paste real grievance or member data into issues or PRs

Unacceptable behaviour may result in warnings or exclusion from the project spaces at the steward’s discretion.

Questions: contact the steward via [unionops.org](https://unionops.org).

Solidarity.
